title: Recrafted: Minecraft
description: This mod aims to add features that (in my opinion) are missing from base vanilla. this mod is for those of you who think that minecraft is missing something
body: This modpack introduces a variety of exciting new features designed to enhance your Minecraft gameplay. From a comprehensive wild update that enriches your exploration experience to the addition of vertical slabs that expand your building possibilities, along with a selection of visual tweaks to beautify your world, downloading this mod promises to elevate your Minecraft adventure to new heights and provide you with a more immersive and enjoyable gaming experience.
